name: KR Crypto Intelligence
description: Korean crypto market data + AI analysis for AI agents. 7 endpoints: AI market read ($0.10, 9 data sources + Claude AI), Kimchi Premium, stablecoin premium, Upbit/Bithumb prices, USD/KRW FX rate. Pay-per-use x402 on Base and Solana. First Korean market data service in the x402 ecosystem.
